title: shuriart Font
description: Smooth, rounder font, made to balance the letters and ease legibility, supporting a wide range of letters from Latin, Greek, Cyrillic, Arabic, Devanagari, Japanese, & more!
body:
# Description
This Resource Pack's goal is to make characters more legible, importing my **original shuriart™ font** combined with **DotGothic16** (free Google font). The characters are intentionally made rounder and smoother to remove the clutter and balance the weight of the letters.

### Recommended 12-34% Line Spacing in Chat Settings (or more)

# Features
Support for:
- all **Latin** characters (including Vietnamese, Turkish, Polish, etc.)
- all **Greek** characters
- all **Cyrillic** characters (including Russian, Ukrainian, Kazakh, Serbian, etc.)
- all **Arabic** characters (including Persian and Jawi)
- all **Devanagari** characters (for Hindi)
- all **CJK** (**Japanese** font), **Hiragana** and **Katakana** characters
- all **IPA** characters, combining diacritics, mathematical operators, arrows, and many other symbols
- also, tweaked **Galactic Alphabet**

### The font may appear quite similar at first, so here's a comparison:

![shuriart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ixY6O998/images/547c79b9ae012d100d30e2676cea86b6639502e6.gif)

### You may also write mathematical expressions if you try:
### ```1 ≨ √2̅ ̅×̅ ̅(̅⁶⁄̅₇̅ ̅+̅ ̅⁸⁄̅₇̅)̅ ≉ ∜-̅5̅ ∉ ℝ```

![Mathematical Expression](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910eb8257f293688499558873b04e638d1f0a779.png)

# Questions or Issues?
